metadata.description: A person in their 50s, appearing male, has olive skin with visible fine lines on the forehead and around the eyes. Their face is an oval shape with a defined jawline. Long, dark grey, tightly curled hair frames the face and extends past the shoulders, with a receding hairline at the temples. The eyes are almond-shaped and green, set moderately apart, with thick, dark, slightly arched eyebrows. The nose has a straight bridge and a rounded tip. The lips are medium thickness, with a well-defined cupid's bow. A short, salt-and-pepper stubble beard covers the jawline and chin. The person's features suggest a mixed heritage. The expression is neutral and contemplative, with the head turned slightly to the left, looking off into the distance.
metadata.anchor: Long, dark grey, tightly curled hair
